summary: This release introduces new device management features and alarm workflow improvements for operators.

items.title: Device Activation and Deactivation
items.description: Enables users to activate or deactivate devices through the configuration menu, controlling whether sensors on the device are operational.

items.title: Continuous Alarm Event Flow
items.description: Ensures alarm events flow continuously through Talos workflow and VAS without interruption, maintaining real-time monitoring capabilities.

items.title: Fixed sensor discovery timeout
items.description: Resolved an issue where sensor discovery would timeout on large deployments with more than 500 devices.

summary: This release focuses on reporting enhancements and performance optimizations.

items.title: New Report Dashboard
items.description: Introduces a redesigned report dashboard with improved filtering and export capabilities.

items.title: API Rate Limiting
items.description: Implemented rate limiting on public API endpoints to improve system stability under high load.
